name: Atlassian Privileged Accounts on Personal Email Domains
description: Detects privileged atlassian accounts tied to personal email domains.
query: SELECT u.account_id AS id, u.email_address AS email FROM atlassian_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.active, true) = true AND (LOWER(COALESCE(u.account_type, '')) LIKE '%admin%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.account_type, '')) LIKE '%owner%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(u.account_type, '')) LIKE '%super%') AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.email_address, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate privileged accounts to corporate identity domains and remove personal-domain privileged access.
